summary.lv: Spinwise meklē DevOps inženieri ar 2+ gadu pieredzi, kas automatizēs iekšējos procesus un izstrādās drošu ieviešanas konveijieru, strādājot ar Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD rīkiem un monitoringa steku.
summary.en: Spinwise is hiring a DevOps Engineer with 2+ years of experience to automate internal processes and build a secure deployment pipeline, working with Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD tools and a monitoring stack.
